subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Primal Point and His Glory unto him who hath been named, in the dominion of names, Káẓim, and who was [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من نقطه الاولی و بهائه الی الذی سمی فی جبروت الاسما بالکاظم و کان من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @prophecy and fulfillment, @service to others; to the Cause of God
